Send service to repostion temperature sensor 36" higher on the monument sign and an additional 6"-8" away from the cabinet. The temp sensor is reading any where between 8-12 degrees warmer than the actual outside temperature. By moving the sensor higher up on the monument sign we can increase the air circulation around the sesnor. We can hopefully decrease the heat coming off the black cabinet and effecting the sensor by moving it farther away from the cabinet. I have checked the sensor connection in the sign and it is good. I have checked with both Watchfire Tech Support and Curt Wilkes at Nagle Signs and both think this is a good next step in getting the sensor to read more accurately.This is 100%20warranty.

Temp sensor is off by as much as plus 12 degrees when it is in direct sunlight. On cloudy over cast days the temp sensor is within 2 degrees of the actual outisde temperature.
